# ecosystemName

**Instance Property**

The name of your ecosystem.

## Declaration

```swift
var ecosystemName: String
```

## Discussion

This is a localized string that appears during device setup.

## Getting the properties

- **homes**: An array of available homes to add the new device into.

items.description: An array of available homes to add the new device into.
